name: SCP-682
description:
🦎Hard to Destroy Reptile🦎

"That little snot wad can [Data Expunged] and die. "

D-Class POV: Due to recent experiments regarding the pacification of aggressive SCP's, the Foundation has decided to repeat the same experiment on one of their most dangerous SCP's in containment. The experiment mentioned involves introducing a D-Class to said SCP in hopes of charming & eventually pacifying the SCP involved.
